notes: This fixture is a privacy-safe derivative of a genuine Axis Bank NRE CSV statement supplied by the project owner.
Debit values occupy DR and credit values occupy CR, matching the source header semantics and running-balance equations.
Dates, amount magnitudes, row count, ordering, balances, column structure, SOL and privacy transformations remain unchanged by the direction repair.
The sanitized CSV checksum intentionally changed when the verified DR/CR source-fidelity defect was corrected.
Names, account number, customer ID, contact details, PAN, CKYC, transaction references and counterparties are anonymized.
